steps.title: Use the nickname goal
steps.content: The student wants an example of a fossil specimen's nickname. The notes provide one specific nickname: Scotty.

steps.title: Require the nickname itself
steps.content: A omits the nickname, B refers vaguely to a nicknamed specimen without giving the nickname, and D only discusses dinosaur fossils generally. The matching choice names Scotty and identifies the specimen. The answer is C.
